header.title: Same product, different limits.
header.description: The free tier lets users try the full experience. Pro monthly expands AI usage, quick-test size, and leaves the system ready for discounts and future renewals.

metrics.quickTestsDescription: Free up to 20. Pro monthly up to 100.
metrics.billingDescription: The system is already prepared for annual billing and temporary discounts.

public.title: Choose the plan that matches your pace
public.description: Both plans keep the same core product. The real difference is usage capacity and study depth.
public.freeBestFor: People getting started and validating the methodology without commitment.
public.proBestFor: People studying every day who need full continuity in AI and revision.

ai.free: AI with initial capacity for occasional doubts.
ai.pro: AI with expanded capacity for intensive usage.

quickTests.pro: Quick tests with higher depth per attempt.

ai.label: AI usage
ai.free: Base access for occasional questions and light daily support.
ai.pro: Higher daily capacity for intensive sessions and continuous work.

quickTests.label: Quick tests
quickTests.free: Best for short reviews and progress checks.
quickTests.pro: Higher per-attempt capacity for longer blocks and realistic simulation.

pace.label: Preparation pace
pace.free: Gradual pace to explore the platform.
pace.pro: Daily pace with continuity and less friction.

currentPlan.description: Right now you have {{aiLimit}} AI requests per day and quick tests up to {{quickTestLimit}} questions.

future.title: Annual plans and timed discounts
future.description: The data layer already supports monthly or yearly plans, percentage discounts, and duration in months or per annual cycle. Only monthly is exposed for now.

discounts.title: Apply code
discounts.description: If you have a valid code, you can attach it to your active subscription. The system supports percentage discounts with limited duration by months or yearly term.
discounts.loginCta: Sign in to apply a code

items.sameFeatures: Both plans share the same core product capabilities.
items.aiQuota: The real difference is the daily AI quota: 3 versus 20.
items.quickTestQuota: The free quick test is capped at 20 questions per topic or block; Pro raises it to 100.
items.discounts: Discounts are applied as percentage reductions with explicit duration.

selector.title: Choose your plan before entering.
selector.description: Your account is already created. Before accessing the dashboard, pick the plan you want to start with. You can change it later from your account.
selector.helper: We need an explicit choice to activate your AI and quick-test limits.
selector.footer: The selection is applied immediately. If you choose Pro, the subscription layer is already ready for real billing later.

highlights.sameFeatures: Both plans keep the same core platform features.
highlights.freeLimit: Free starts with 3 AI requests per day and quick tests up to 20 questions.
highlights.proLimit: Pro monthly expands usage to 20 daily AI requests and up to 100 questions per quick test.

toasts.savedDescription: Your account is now ready with the {{plan}} plan.

upgradeDialog.footer: Switching to Pro monthly expands this feature limit without changing the rest of your setup.

assistant.title: You used all free-plan AI requests
assistant.description: The free tier stops at {{currentLimit}} requests per day. Pro monthly expands that to {{targetLimit}} so you can keep using AI today.

quick-test.title: This test exceeds your free limit
quick-test.description: With the free tier you can generate quick tests of up to {{currentLimit}} questions. Pro monthly unlocks up to {{targetLimit}} per attempt.

toasts.planChangedDescription: Your account now uses the {{plan}} plan.
toasts.planChangedErrorDescription: Try again in a few seconds.
toasts.paymentRedirectDescription: Taking you to checkout to complete Pro subscription.
toasts.checkoutStartErrorDescription: Try again in a few seconds.
toasts.checkoutSuccessDescription: Your plan will refresh in a few seconds.
toasts.discountAppliedDescription: The discount is now attached to your active subscription.
toasts.discountAppliedErrorDescription: Review the code and try again.

free.name: Free
free.description: Best for getting started, validating the product, and keeping a light routine with no monthly cost.
features: Ideal for exploring the platform before scaling up.

pro.name: Pro monthly
pro.description: Built for users already relying on the product every day and needing more continuity with AI and deeper quick-test sessions.
features: All free-plan capabilities with no extra cuts.
Compatible with percentage discounts for months or yearly term.
